# Data Model Checklist: Deduplicate open-data entities

**Purpose**: Ensure entities and fields cover matching, canonical entities, QA, and publication.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/021-deduplicate-open-data/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Deduplication run entity captures run ID, configuration, and status.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Match candidates store evidence, scores, and decisions.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Canonical entities and canonical-to-source links are represented.
- [x] CHK-DM-004 QA results capture count reduction, over-merge flags, and distance violations.

## Auditability

- [x] CHK-DM-005 Publication outcomes and warnings are captured per run.
